name: SSILVB
author: automata-rtx
description: Screen Space Indirect Lighting with Visibility Bitmask (Therrien et al. 2023): one bounce of colored indirect light gathered through a 32-sector visibility bitmask, with jittered temporal accumulation, edge-aware denoise, and half-resolution support. Disable the bounce and it acts as a standalone directional AO. Requires the Depth to Normal mod.
